dataset_path: /Volumes/dockcase2tb/database_all/股票数据/行情数据/周线行情
partition_date_rationale: dt=20260415 matches the existing stock_basic fixture sentinel; interpreted as snapshot-fetch-date, not as the trade_date of the contained rows. Weekly corpus data for 600519.SH does not extend to trade_date=2026-04-15 but that is by design — the fixture stores the last 8 weekly bars of the cut window as a historical time series snapshot fetched on 2026-04-15.
normalization_notes: corpus weekly CSV column order is [ts_code, trade_date, close, open, high, low, pre_close, change, pct_chg, vol, amount]

fixture reorders to TUSHARE_BAR_SCHEMA canonical order [ts_code, trade_date, open, high, low, close, pre_close, change, pct_chg, vol, amount] (close moved from col 3 to col 6) so the parquet schema matches src/data_platform/adapters/tushare/assets.py:TUSHARE_BAR_SCHEMA
all numeric columns kept as pa.string() per TUSHARE_RAW_NUMERIC_TYPE; type conversion is the staging model's job
